svg.aria-label: Step responses for low, medium, and high proportional gain, each settling short of the target line by an offset equal to load over Kp, the offset bracket shrinking as the gain grows and the highest gain overshooting
svg.title: Step responses for low, medium, and high proportional gain, each settling short of the target line by an offset equal to load over Kp, the offset bracket shrinking as the gain grows and the highest gain overshooting
svg.text: Proportional control: higher Kp → smaller offset (e_ss = load/Kp)
each settles short of target by e_ss = load/Kp; the brackets shrink as Kp grows
